nwaa 0.1.0

    • Water Use Models

Download NWAA model output (generic)

Source: R/nwaa_data.R
nwaa_data.Rd

Download NWAA model output (generic)

Usage

nwaa_data(
  model_id,
  variable_ids,
  location_type,
  location_id,
  time_res = "monthly",
  range = c("recent", "historical", "custom"),
  start = NULL,
  end = NULL,
  intersection = NULL,
  skip = 0,
  format = "csv",
  quiet = TRUE
)

Arguments

model_id

Model ID. See nwaa_wu_models.

variable_ids

One or more variable IDs. See nwaa_wu_variables.

location_type

One of nwaa_location_types$type.

location_id

Identifier for the selected location type.

time_res

"monthly", "annualwy", "annualcy".

range

"recent", "historical", "custom".

start, end

For range = "custom".

intersection

Optional, e.g. "overlap" or "envelop".

skip

Record offset for paging.

format

"csv", "json", or "geojson".

quiet

If FALSE, prints request URL and content type.

Value

Parsed data: tibble for csv, list for json, sf object for geojson.
